list.name: Peden RV Superstore
description: Coachmen (Beyond) dealer on the island (Google 4.5 stars).

list.name: SunWest RV Centre
description: Although we did not purchase our Van here, they were, by far, the most helpful.

list.name: Campbell River RV & Marine
description: Seem very appreciated, with occasional miss (Google 4.2 stars).
After some checks, they are able to perform maintenance/warranty work on our Beyond,
much more practical than driving 3 hours to Peden in Sidney.
At 1632 Coulter Rd Campbell River, BC

list.name: Ford dealership in Campbell River

list.name: Van Toys
